# PERF-72 positive: db.Transaction inside an Echo handler
lang: go
file: PERF-072-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/labstack/echo/v4"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

func CreateUser(c echo.Context, db *gorm.DB) error {
	err := db.Transaction(func(tx *gorm.DB) error {
		return tx.Create(&User{Name: "x"}).Error
	})
	if err != nil {
		return c.String(500, "err")
	}
	return c.String(200, "ok")
}

type User struct {
	gorm.Model
	Name string
}
